text.title: QA Session-Based Test Management Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-session-based-test-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: pre-flight
step.action: Verify env up, accounts provisioned, recorder running.

step.name: classify-findings
step.action: Split into bug/issue/task; tag severity from rubric.

step.name: commit-report
step.action: Write canonical report to repo; link from feature spec.
